[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000010 1
2 0001000000 1
3 1101100011 6
4 1011111011 8
5 1100110001 5
6 0010110001 4
7 0011011010 5
